title: Usopp Uses Tabasco Star
description: On pages 6–10, usopp uses tabasco star as luffy, Usopp, and Karoo break Baroque Works’ formation, exposing Mr. 3’s wax armor and freeing the crew from the execution trap.
scene: Usopp Uses Tabasco Star. Luffy, Usopp, and Karoo break Baroque Works’ formation, exposing Mr. 3’s wax armor and freeing the crew from the execution trap. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: How many times do I have to show you that using gunpowder is useless against a human-bomb!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Sorry, but I just told a little white lie. That wasn't gunpowder...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It was my special tabasco star!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I've personally tested just how effective it can be!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: I'll blow you up into smitherens with my "full body explosion!"

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Not even your bones will be left when I'm done with you!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Hmm, Flaming swords aren't too shabby either...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The import- tant thing is we're still alive.

summary: This part centers on usopp uses tabasco star, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
